zone_6b_notes: Direct sow after last frost (May 1–15 in Farmington). Needs a trellis, fence, or pole 5–6 feet tall. Longer harvest window than bush beans — pick every 2–3 days once pods begin. Missouri summers favor pole beans over bush types later in the season. Blue Lake and Kentucky Wonder are reliable in Zone 6b.
water: 1 inch per week — consistent moisture prevents tough, stringy pods
